movies.plot: N/A

movies.plot: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, returns home to find his father murdered and his mother remarrying the murderer, his uncle. Meanwhile, war is brewing.

movies.plot: Caleb Wingate is given a choice over who lives and dies on his wedding day by an assassin known as The Wolf.

movies.plot: Trapped by a delusional family convinced she's their lost daughter, a woman plays along with their dangerous fantasy while desperately seeking escape.

movies.plot: The children of a once famous artist hire a forger to complete some unfinished, long ago abandoned canvases so they'll have an inheritance when he dies.

movies.plot: Follows the definitive documentary on comedian Martin Short, exploring his career across film, television, theater and comedy.

movies.plot: After a tragic event, a woman finds herself alone while everyone else continues with their lives as if nothing had happened.

movies.plot: In a picturesque Tuscan town, Elisa's world shifts when a childhood friend's return stirs up old emotions.

movies.title: Normal
movies.plot: Centers on a temporary small-town sheriff who uncovers dark mysteries after a local bank robbery.

movies.plot: A man's journey through life, marked by various names and labels, leads him to unexpected success while confronting modern social issues and personal struggles along the way.

movies.plot: It follows the story of Vandana, whose marriage unravels due to betrayal and dangerous choices, leading to a "poisonous" love story.
